description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Deliverable:
Add test/test_support/state_json_fixture.ex with helpers seed/2, read/1, assert_state_contains/3 to drive multi-trajectory state.json fixtures (cold/warm/seeded/dangling). Wire test/test_support into mix.exs elixirc_paths (test env only) and into test_helper.exs.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: existing test/specled_ex/realization/hash_store_test.exs continues to pass.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: at least one new test in hash_store_test.exs (or a smoke test in a new test file) uses StateJsonFixture to seed and read state.json contents in a tmp root.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/**
- .spec/**
- priv/**
Allowed touches:
- test/test_support/state_json_fixture.ex
- mix.exs (elixirc_paths only)
- test/test_helper.exs

Out of Scope (intent):
- No production code changes.
- No modification of HashStore semantics (that's S1).
- No modification of existing test fixtures.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

Summary: Adds SpecLedEx.StateJsonFixture under test/test_support/ to drive multi-trajectory state.json fixtures (cold/warm/seeded/dangling) for downstream stages. The fixture sits on top of HashStore.write/2 / read/1 — seed/2 hex-encodes raw binary hashes and stamps the current hasher_version, read/1 delegates to HashStore.read/1, and assert_state_contains/3 raises ExUnit.AssertionError with diagnostic context. mix.exs gains a test-env `elixirc_paths(:test)` clause appending "test/test_support" to the lib paths so the helper is compiled into the project app under MIX_ENV=test only; production builds remain unchanged. No production code changes; no .spec/** changes; no modification of HashStore semantics or existing test fixtures (legacy test_support/ at the repo root is untouched and continues to load via Code.require_file/2).
